meaning: n.公民的身份,公民的职责和权力
examples: They're going to take my citizenship away.
Citizenship is about the sense of nationhood.
You can apply for citizenship after five years' residency.
Between 1995 and 2010, the number of people in the Netherlands with dual citizenship nearly tripled.
Citizenship has been an essentially passive legal status involving few demands beyond obeying the law.
